positive: A stylized, central illustration of a friendly, mythical celestial fox (Kitsune) sitting among blooming cherry blossoms and glowing bioluminescent flora. The fox should have an elegant, powerful silhouette, with flowing, layered tails that contrast against the soft, deep indigo and jade background. Use strong contrast lighting, emphasizing clean lines and vibrant jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, rose gold). The composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a circular vignette, designed for apparel printing. Highly detailed digital painting, vector-art quality, Ukiyo-e influence meets modern tattoo flash.
negative: photorealistic, blurry, artifacts, noise, text, signature, logo, watermark, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low contrast, muted colors, sketch, grayscale, anime style
